basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), New Delhi
basic_details.short_information: AIIMS is recruiting 1 Lab Assistant post with 12th Pass qualification, last date 29 June 2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions before applying.
qualification.experience: Knowledge and experience in operation of CT scanners in ICU is required.

how_to_apply: Candidates should send their CV to the given email address. No other mode of application will be accepted.
important_instructions: This is a contractual position under the project and not a regular employment of AIIMS. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for further process. Candidates must mention Project Code (N-2673) and Post Name in the subject line while sending CV. Selected candidate will be engaged as per the project requirement. AIIMS reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process at any stage.

all_official_links.label: AIIMS Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 Official Notification

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for AIIMS Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 is 29 June 2026. Interested candidates must send their updated CV through the prescribed email before the deadline. Applications received after the closing date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AIIMS Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: AIIMS Raj Nagar, New Delhi has announced 1 vacancy for the post of Lab Assistant under Project Code N-2673. Since there is only one position available, candidates are advised to submit their applications as early as possible to avoid missing the opportunity.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for AIIMS Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th Standard from a recognized board to be eligible for the Lab Assistant post. Although graduation is not mandatory, graduates will be given preference during the selection process. Relevant technical knowledge and experience will also be considered.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for AIIMS Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 45 years as per the date of advertisement. Candidates should ensure they satisfy the age criteria before applying. Any applicable relaxation, if provided by the project authority, will be mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the AIIMS Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed monthly salary of Rs. 25,000 under the project. This is a consolidated amount without additional allowances. The appointment is purely contractual and will continue as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for AIIMS Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening of applications followed by shortlisting of eligible candidates. Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted for further rounds, which may include an interview or document verification. AIIMS will communicate the details directly to shortlisted candidates.
